successCriteria.description: File `src/modules/ping/ping.service.ts` exists and exports class `PingService` that `implements IPingService`
`getPing()` method returns `{ status: 'ok' }` typed as `PingResponse` (matching the literal `'ok'` type from the model)
Implementation follows the same structural pattern as `src/modules/uptime/uptime.service.ts`: class implements interface, method returns model type, no constructor dependencies

constraints: Must implement the `IPingService` interface contract exactly — `getPing(): PingResponse`
Must return the literal value `{ status: 'ok' }` matching the `PingResponse` type (`status: 'ok'` literal, not `status: string`)
Zero external module dependencies — this is a pure leaf module with no imports outside `./ping.model` and `./ping.service.interface`
Must use ES module syntax (`import`/`export`) per AGENTS.md conventions — no `require()`
outOfScope: Phase 3: Create `src/modules/ping/ping.routes.ts` — Fastify route registration for GET /ping
Phase 5: Update `src/app.ts` to register ping routes alongside uptime routes
